name: Multiple forklifts collided at work involving subcontractor who pays?

mainEntity.name: Multiple forklifts collided at work involving subcontractor who pays?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Your workers' comp first; sue negligent subcontractor as third-party.** Full tort damages possible.[3] Key factors: Prove their breach (e.g., untrained operator).[3] Comp carrier liens reduced in settlement.
